title: Invitation for Pre-Qualification - Lease of Land for Investment at University of Dar es Salaam
description: The University of Dar es Salaam intends to pre-qualify potential investor and/or firm for Lease of Land for Investment at the University of Dar es Salaam, Mwl. J.K. Nyerere Mlimani Campus. Applications must be submitted through NeST at or before 2:00 PM on 14/03/2025.
eligibility: Open to all applicants as defined in the Regulations. Must register on NeST at nest.go.tz
